channel.title: MBallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from MBallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Federal prosecutors fail to secure grand jury indictment for 'seditious six' Democrats
item.description: Federal prosecutors from the District of Columbia reportedly tried and failed Tuesday to convince a grand jury to indict six Democratic lawmakers who ...

item.title: Federal Regulators Finally Get Out of the Climate Business
item.description: Consumers and businesses will be freer when the EPA no longer treats greenhouse gas emissions as a public danger.

item.title: Former federal prosecutor who quit amid Trump administration dispute now representing Don Lemon
item.description: A former federal prosecutor who quit amid a dispute with the Trump administration is now representing former CNN host Don Lemon, who was one of nine p...

item.title: Civil War Breaks Out at Human Rights Watch
item.description: The turmoil presents an opportunity for accountability.

item.title: The Revenge of Silence of the Lambs
item.description: A week of seismic film and cultural abduction.

item.title: Why Election Crimes Are Rarely Prosecuted In Georgia
item.description: The structural dysfunction of state offices in enforcing Georgia's election law has too often led to flagrant disregard of those laws.

item.title: California Is Teaching America How To Destroy Itself
item.description: People running for elected office to govern the state promise an unbroken flood of new spending, while people holding elected office and governing the...

item.title: Campus antisemitism driven by faculty at University of California campuses, report finds
item.description: The pro-Palestinian student protesters who swarmed U.S. campuses, erected pro-Gaza encampments and terrorized Jewish students for two years had plenty...

item.title: Unsealed Court Docs Show The FBI Probing Possible Election Crimes In Fulton County
item.description: Meanwhile, The Washington Post runs cover for the Georgia county's 'extremely sloppy' election administration in 2020.

item.title: Trump team blames Mexican cartel drones for El Paso, Texas, airspace closure
item.description: Mexican cartel drones breached U.S. airspace, the Trump administration said, leading to the sudden closure of airspace over El Paso, Texas, Wednesday ...

item.title: Census Numbers Paint a Misleading Picture of Poverty in America
item.description: Non-cash benefits bring many Americans above the poverty line â and our poverty statistics should reflect that.

item.title: The Classic Learning Test Finally Gives The Woke College Board And SAT Some Competition
item.description: With AP teachers increasingly focused on race, gender, and social movements, the CLT is attempting to end the partisan paradigm.

item.title: Three Republicans side with Democrats to restore House ability to overturn Trump tariffs
item.description: House lawmakers, for the first time since President Trump implemented sweeping tariffs, now can use their authority to end the emergency declarations ...

item.title: Foreign-Born Member Of Congress Threatens Republicans With Prison When Democrats Regain Power

item.title: The UAEâBinanceâTrump Affair: A Comprehensive Timeline
item.description: How did Trumpâs net worth skyrocket during his second term? The final installment in this series pieces together key events.
